items.title_en: Hyundai buys Boston Dynamics
items.title_zh: 现代集团全面控股 Boston Dynamics
items.summary_en: Hyundai has completed securing full control of Boston Dynamics, with SoftBank exiting the stake for about $325 million. This move bets big on Hyundai’s robotics ambitions, signaling a push to integrate robot hardware, AI, and mobility platforms across its business units. Boston Dynamics gains a more stable automotive-aligned parent with resources to scale.
items.summary_zh: 现代集团完成对 Boston Dynamics 的全面控股，软银退出，交易额约3.25亿美元。这笔交易巩固了现代在机器人领域的长期野心，便于在其业务线里整合机器人硬件、人工智能与智能出行生态。

items.title_en: Is AI ruining our skills? Early results are in – and they're not good
items.title_zh: AI 会毁掉我们的技能吗？初步结果不乐观
items.summary_en: Early studies suggest heavy reliance on AI can erode some skills, particularly tasks that AI often handles well. The findings argue for careful design of training, education, and work processes to preserve core competencies, with human-AI collaboration as the intended model.
items.summary_zh: 早期研究表明过度依赖 AI 可能侵蚀某些技能，尤其是那些 AI 已擅长完成的任务。这提醒教育与工作流程需要更审慎地设计，以在促进协作的同时保护人类核心能力。

items.title_en: Google workspace threatening to block Firefox access
items.title_zh: Google Workspace 可能阻止 Firefox 访问
items.summary_en: If true, Google Workspace blocking Firefox would raise questions about browser compatibility and vendor lock-in in enterprise tools. It would push users toward Chromium-based ecosystems and complicate privacy-focused setups. The broader signal is about how much control platforms exert over client access.
items.summary_zh: 若属实，Google Workspace 可能阻断 Firefox 访问，将引发对企业工具中的浏览器兼容性与厂商锁定的讨论。这会推动用户转向以 Chromium 为核心的生态，并影响偏好隐私的工作环境。

items.title_en: Amateur may have cracked Linear A, a 120-year-old puzzle
items.title_zh: 业余人士可能破解了120年前的线性A文字难题
items.summary_en: An amateur researcher claims a breakthrough in Linear A using modern computational methods. The result is preliminary and contested by experts, but if validated it could unlock a new window into Bronze Age Aegean scripts and Minoan culture. The claim underscores how AI-assisted analysis can catalyze long-standing decipherment work, even if verification remains essential.
items.summary_zh: 一名业余研究者声称借助现代计算方法对线性A文字取得突破，这一说法尚未得到专家广泛验证。若证实，可能为揭示青铜时代爱琴海文明的沟通系统打开新窗口，也凸显 AI 辅助分析在长期破译工作中的潜力与需要严谨的证据。

items.title_en: A new bill takes aim at government pressure to silence lawful online speech
items.title_zh: 新法案瞄准政府压制合法在线言论
items.summary_en: The proposed bill would curb government pressure on platforms to remove lawful online speech, establishing clearer standards, transparency, and redress. It signals a legislative push to protect free expression online while still addressing harm online through targeted tools and accountability.
items.summary_zh: 新法案拟限制政府对平台施压，要求对合法在线言论的删除设定清晰标准并提高透明度和救济途径。此举旨在保护网络表达自由，同时为治理网络有害内容提供更有针对性的工具与问责机制。

items.title_en: There Are No Instances in ATProto
items.title_zh: ATProto 中不存在实例概念
items.summary_en: ATProto’s architecture is often misunderstood as having 'instances'. The author argues there are no such isolated 'instances' in ATProto because federation uses accounts and servers differently, emphasizing interoperability and same-identity across servers. This reframes how developers should think about hosting and moderation in ATProto.
items.summary_zh: ATProto 的架构常被误解为‘实例’概念。作者指出在 ATProto 的联邦模型里并不存在真正的‘实例’，强调跨服务器的互操作性和统一身份的重要性，这对开发者在托管与 moderation 上的思路有显著影响。

items.title_en: Project Valhalla, Explained: How a Decade of Work Arrives in JDK 28
items.title_zh: Valhalla 项目解读：十年研发在 JDK 28 落地
items.summary_en: Project Valhalla brings value types and specialized generics to the JVM, enabling compact, allocation-free data representations and faster APIs. This explainer frames the decade-long effort, the tradeoffs involved, and what JDK 28 users can expect in terms of performance, memory efficiency, and backward compatibility.
items.summary_zh: Valhalla 将为 JVM 引入值类型与专用泛型，带来更紧凑、无分配的数据表示和更快的 API。本文梳理了十余年的实现过程、设计取舍，以及 JDK 28 用户在性能、内存效率和向后兼容性方面将看到的变化。

items.title_en: Giant Banana Pulled over in Montana Driver Says Cops Have Stopped Him 100s Times
items.title_zh: 蒙大拿州司机因巨大香蕉道具多次被拦下
items.summary_en: A Montana driver with a giant banana prop says police have pulled him over hundreds of times, raising questions about municipal policing quirks and public curiosity. The story highlights how unusual props can become local folklore and trigger repeated enforcement contact.
items.summary_zh: 一名蒙大拿州司机称携带巨型香蕉道具数百次被警方拦下，引发对地方警务和公众好奇心的讨论。这起趣闻凸显了异想天开的道具如何成为当地民间传说并引发重复执法接触。

items.title_en: The room the economy can't see
items.title_zh: 经济看不见的角落
items.summary_en: Explores parts of the economy that traditional metrics fail to capture, such as informal work and shadow activity, arguing for richer data to reveal the true economic landscape. It invites reconsideration of how we measure growth and well-being.
items.summary_zh: 讨论传统经济统计无法覆盖的领域，如非正式就业和影子经济，呼吁使用更丰富的数据来描绘真实的经济格局。文章促使人们重新思考经济增长与福利的衡量方式。

items.title_en: I found 10k GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware
items.title_zh: 我发现一万多个 GitHub 仓库在分发木马恶意软件
items.summary_en: A collection of about 10,000 GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware highlights the scale of malware hosted on code platforms. It underscores the importance of supply-chain security and rigorous review of dependencies when building software.
items.summary_zh: 大约一万多个 GitHub 仓库被发现用于传播木马恶意软件，揭示代码托管平台上恶意分发的规模。这凸显了在构建软件时加强供应链安全和依赖审查的重要性。

items.title_en: Norway greenlights first full-scale ship tunnel
items.title_zh: 挪威批准全球首座全尺度船舶隧道
items.summary_en: Norway approves the first full-scale ship tunnel, a massive civil engineering project to re-route maritime traffic inland. The tunnel promises energy and emissions savings, smoother shipping routes, and a case study in large-scale infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 挪威批准全球首座全尺度船舶隧道，这是一个将海上航线部分改造为陆地通道的巨大工程。隧道有望降低能耗与排放、优化航道并成为大型基础设施的实践案例。

items.title_en: Swiss parliament lifts ban on new nuclear power plants
items.title_zh: 瑞士议会解除对新核电厂的禁令
items.summary_en: Switzerland's parliament voted to lift the ban on new nuclear power plants, signaling a pivot in the country's energy strategy. The move could affect climate goals, energy security, and the pace of nuclear innovation in Europe.
items.summary_zh: 瑞士议会投票解除对新核电厂的禁令，标志着能源战略的转折。此举可能影响碳目标、能源安全以及欧洲在核能创新上的推进速度。

items.title_en: Court Records Should Be Free
items.title_zh: 法院记录应免费开放
items.summary_en: EFF argues that court records should be freely accessible and machine-readable to improve transparency, research, and accountability. The movement pushes for open court data standards and reduces friction for journalists, researchers, and the public.
items.summary_zh: EFF 呼吁法院记录应免费向公众开放并可机器可读，以提升透明度、研究和问责。倡导建立公开的法院数据标准，降低记者、研究者和公众的使用成本。

items.title_en: Midjourney Medical
items.title_zh: Midjourney 医疗应用
items.summary_en: Midjourney extends its generative AI into medical contexts, exploring potential uses for imaging, diagnostics, and patient communication. The discussion highlights the tradeoffs between creative flexibility and the stringent safety, privacy, and accuracy requirements in healthcare.
items.summary_zh: Midjourney 将其生成式 AI 引入医疗场景，探索在影像、诊断与病人沟通中的潜在应用。讨论强调在医疗领域对安全、隐私与准确性等高要求与创意灵活性之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Show HN: Are You in the Weights?
items.title_zh: Show HN：Are You in the Weights?
items.summary_en: Show HN presents a project centered on model weights, inviting the community to explore, audit, or contribute to a weights-focused tool or dataset.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一个聚焦模型权重的项目，邀请社区参与探索、审阅或为一个权重相关的工具或数据集贡献。

items.title_en: Microsoft new Outlook takes 10 seconds to do what Outlook Classic does instantly
items.title_zh: 微软新版 Outlook 比经典版慢十秒
items.summary_en: The new Outlook design takes about ten seconds to complete tasks that the classic app did instantly, highlighting a productivity hit from modernization. This reflects a broader tension between feature-rich updates and user experience in enterprise software, fueling calls for an option to revert to a familiar workflow.
items.summary_zh: 新版 Outlook 在完成一些经典版能瞬间完成的任务时需约十秒，暴露出现代化改造带来的生产力损失。这反映了企业软件在功能增强与用户体验之间的博弈，也推动了对保留熟悉工作流的需求。

items.title_en: The AirPods Effect
items.title_zh: AirPods 效应
items.summary_en: The AirPods effect reshaped consumer expectations around wireless audio, battery life, and device interoperability. It spurred rapid adoption of true wireless design, influenced accessory ecosystems, and shifted how tech brands think about on-device interactions.
items.summary_zh: AirPods 效应改变了消费者对无线音频、续航与设备互操作性的预期，推动了真无线设计的快速普及并影响周边生态。它也促使厂商重新思考设备交互的设计与生态策略。

items.title_en: I told them forced consent was unlawful. 5 years later it cost Elkjop €1.8M
items.title_zh: 我曾告诉他们强制同意违法，5年后 Elkjøp 被罚 180 万欧元
items.summary_en: Forcing user consent is unlawful and can trigger hefty penalties; this case shows a retailer paying €1.8M five years later. The outcome underscores the necessity of informed, freely given, and revocable consent, plus robust privacy-by-design practices.
items.summary_zh: 强制获取用户同意违反法律，最终导致高额罚款；该案五年后 Elkjøp 被处以 €180 万罚金，凸显知情、自由且可撤销同意的重要性，以及以隐私为设计核心的合规实践。

items.title_en: John Jumper leaves Google to join Anthropic
items.title_zh: John Jumper 从谷歌跳槽至 Anthropic
items.summary_en: John Jumper, a prominent AI scientist, is moving from Google to Anthropic, signaling ongoing talent mobility in the AI safety space. The move could accelerate safety-focused research and cross-pollination of ideas between leading AI labs.
items.summary_zh: 著名 AI 科学家 John Jumper 从谷歌跳槽至 Anthropic，体现 AI 安全领域的人才跨流动。此次转变可能推动安全研究协同与前沿思想在顶尖实验室之间的交流。

items.title_en: Ice water drowning survival of young patient (2025)
items.title_zh: 冰水溺水后年轻患者存活病例（2025）
items.summary_en: A case report documents a young patient who survived drowning after ice-water immersion with a favorable neurological outcome. It reinforces that cold exposure can extend the window for resuscitation and underscores the importance of rapid CPR and high-quality post-resuscitation care.
items.summary_zh: 本病例报道记录了一名年轻溺水者在冰水中生还并获得良好神经功能结果。研究强调寒冷水体的保护性影响可能延长复苏窗口，并凸显快速高质量 CPR 与事后护理的重要性。

items.title_en: So You Want to Define a Well-Known URI
items.title_zh: 如何定义一个 well-known URI
items.summary_en: Well-known URIs are standardized endpoints for exposing configuration and metadata across services.
items.summary_zh: well-known URI 是用于在服务间暴露配置与元数据的标准化端点。这篇文章给出实践准则、常见坑点以及在指定和记录这些端点时的安全考量。

items.title_en: .gitignore Isn't the only way to ignore files in Git
items.title_zh: .gitignore 不是忽略文件的唯一方式
items.summary_en: There are tactics to ignore files in Git beyond .gitignore, including skip-worktree and assume-unchanged, plus index-level tricks.
items.summary_zh: .gitignore 之外还有忽略文件的办法，如 skip-worktree、assume-unchanged 等。文中介绍了何时使用以及可能的风险。

items.title_en: The founder of Craigslist has given away half a billion dollars
items.title_zh: Craigslist 创始人捐出 5 亿美元
items.summary_en: Craig Newmark, Craigslist's founder, has given away about $500 million, underscoring a notable philanthropic commitment from a tech founder. The donations likely support journalism and civil society causes, reflecting a trend of tech leaders funding public goods.
items.summary_zh: Craigslist 创始人 Craig Newmark 已捐出约 5 亿美元，展示了科技创始人对公益的长期承诺。这笔捐款大多用于支持新闻业、公民社会等领域，体现科技领袖在公共事务上的影响力与责任感。

items.title_en: Many Let's Encrypt renewals had errors today
items.title_zh: 今日大量 Let's Encrypt 续期出现错误
items.summary_en: A broad outage of automated certificate renewals caused widespread renewal failures, stressing the importance of monitoring, backup plans, and redundancy in PKI automation. It underscores the fragility of self-signed or automated processes in securing TLS.
items.summary_zh: 今日 Let’s Encrypt 自动续期普遍出错，导致大量证书续期失败。事件凸显自动化 PKI 流程的脆弱性，需要更健全的监控、回退策略与冗余设计。

items.title_en: Zero-Touch OAuth for MCP
items.title_zh: MCP 的零触控 OAuth
items.summary_en: Zero-Touch OAuth for MCP introduces an enterprise-friendly OAuth flow that provisions tokens and apps with minimal human intervention. It emphasizes automated onboarding, device registration, and policy-driven access controls to reduce friction while preserving security. This approach helps large organizations deploy cloud-native apps faster without compromising governance.
items.summary_zh: 零触控 OAuth 为 MCP 提供面向企业的简化认证流程，尽量减少人工配置即可完成令牌和应用的注册。强调自动化的上线流程、设备注册与基于策略的访问控制，在降低运维成本的同时保持安全性。对于需要快速部署云原生应用的大型组织尤为重要。

items.title_en: Emacs 31 is around the corner: The changes I'm daily driving
items.title_zh: Emacs 31 即将到来：我日常使用中的变更点
items.summary_en: As Emacs 31 approaches, the author details daily-driving changes that improve editing, navigation, and package management. These practical tweaks promise meaningful productivity gains for power users who customize their workflow. It’s a glimpse into how small iterates accumulate into a better editing experience.
items.summary_zh: 随着 Emacs 31 的到来，作者分享日常使用中的改动点，涵盖编辑、导航和包管理等方面的提升。这些实际改动对定制工作流的高级用户可能带来显著的生产力提升，展示了小改动如何累积成更高效的编辑体验。

items.title_en: Ubiquiti: Enterprise NAS, Built on ZFS
items.title_zh: Ubiquiti：企业级 NAS，基于 ZFS
items.summary_en: Ubiquiti announces an enterprise NAS built on ZFS, emphasizing data integrity, snapshots, and scalable storage for SMBs. The product signals growing interest in software-defined storage among cost-conscious businesses.
items.summary_zh: Ubiquiti 推出基于 ZFS 的企业级 NAS，强调数据完整性、快照功能与可扩展存储，面向中小企业。此举显示成本敏感型企业对软件定义存储兴趣上升。

items.title_en: CS 6120: Advanced Compilers: The Self-Guided Online Course (2020)
items.title_zh: 高级编译器：自学在线课程
items.summary_en: Cornell's Advanced Compilers self-guided online course offers deep dives into optimization, intermediate representations, and code generation, with hands-on exercises you can tackle at your own pace. It's a solid resource for researchers and senior developers aiming to master modern compiler tech.
items.summary_zh: 康奈尔大学的高级编译器自学课程提供对优化、中间表示和代码生成的深入讲解，并配有可自学的动手练习。对于研究人员和资深开发者而言，是掌握现代编译技术的扎实资源。

items.title_en: Modos Color Monitor Pushes E-Paper Displays Further
items.title_zh: Modos 彩色显示器推动电子纸显示屏进一步发展
items.summary_en: Modos Color Monitor introduces a color e-paper display, pushing low-power, high-contrast visuals toward more practical use cases like dashboards and signage. The development widens the scope of e-paper beyond static text.
items.summary_zh: Modos 彩色显示器带来彩色电子纸，实现低功耗、对比度高的显示，拓展了在仪表板和标牌等场景的应用。电子纸的用途因此更加丰富。

items.title_en: Datasette Apps: Host custom HTML applications inside Datasette
items.title_zh: Datasette 应用：在 Datasette 内托管自定义 HTML 应用
items.summary_en: Datasette now supports embedding custom HTML apps within a Datasette instance, enabling richer, self-contained data apps around datasets. This lowers the barrier to building dashboards and tools without separate hosting.
items.summary_zh: Datasette App 让用户在 Datasette 实例中托管自定义 HTML 应用，允许在数据集周围构建更丰富的一体化应用。这降低了搭建仪表板和工具的门槛，无需额外托管。

items.title_en: Hospitals and universities repurposing drugs at lower cost
items.title_zh: 医院与高校以约90%成本进行药物再利用
items.summary_en: Hospitals and universities are repurposing existing drugs to cut treatment costs by up to about 90%, enabling broader access and faster deployment of therapies. The approach raises regulatory and safety considerations, but could reshape drug affordability.
items.summary_zh: 医院与高校通过对现有药物进行再利用，治疗成本大幅下降，降幅可达约 90%，从而提升治疗可及性。该做法涉及监管与安全考量，但可能改变药物的可负担性。

items.title_en: W Social, public institutions and the theater of European digital sovereignty
items.title_zh: W Social、公共机构与欧洲数字主权的舞台
items.summary_en: The piece argues that public institutions and platforms like W Social shape Europe’s digital sovereignty narrative, highlighting governance, data governance, and the performative politics around sovereignty. It critiques how rhetoric often masks underlying regulatory tensions.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨像 W Social 这样的平台与公共机构在欧洲数字主权话语中的角色，聚焦治理、数据主权以及主权话语背后的张力。作者指出表述往往掩盖了现实中的监管冲突与政治博弈。

items.title_en: EU to soon classify AWS and Azure as gatekeepers under DSA
items.title_zh: 欧盟将很快把 AWS 与 Azure 列为 DSA 下的守门人
items.summary_en: EU regulators are set to classify AWS and Azure as gatekeepers under the DSA, signaling that dominant cloud platforms will face stricter obligations around data access, interoperability, and anti-competitive practices. The move could reshape cloud competition and push major providers toward more open ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟监管机构拟将 AWS 与 Azure列为 DSA 下的守门人，要求在数据访问、互操作性和反竞争方面承担更严格的义务。此举或将改变云服务市场的竞争格局，推动建立更开放的生态系统。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gerrymandle - Daily puzzle game where you redraw electoral districts
items.title_zh: Show HN：Gerrymandle - 每日拼图游戏，你重新绘制选区
items.summary_en: Show HN: Gerrymandle is a daily puzzle game where you redraw electoral districts, combining map geometry with strategic play. It’s a playful exploration of political geography and algorithmic design.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Gerrymandle 是一款每日拼图游戏，让你重新绘制选区，结合地图几何与策略玩法。它以有趣的方式展现了政治地理与算法设计。

items.title_en: Noam Shazeer Joins OpenAI
items.title_zh: Noam Shazeer 加入 OpenAI
items.summary_en: Noam Shazeer, a prominent figure in AI, has joined OpenAI, marking another high-profile talent move among leading research labs. The hire signals OpenAI's ongoing effort to attract top researchers to advance its language and AI capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 著名 AI 研究者 Noam Shazeer 加入 OpenAI，再次凸显顶尖实验室之间的人才竞逐。此举可能影响团队的研究方向与协作模式，也体现出对更强大语言模型的持续追求。

items.title_en: How Alberta Eradicated Rats
items.title_zh: 阿尔伯塔省如何根除老鼠
items.summary_en: Alberta's war on rats outlines a comprehensive program blending pest control, public health measures, and community engagement to reduce rodent populations. The piece offers lessons for urban wildlife management.
items.summary_zh: 阿尔伯塔省的清除老鼠行动整合了害虫控制、公共卫生与社区参与等措施，显著降低了鼠群规模，为城市野生动物管理提供了经验。

items.title_en: Migrating from GNU Stow to Chezmoi
items.title_zh: 从 GNU Stow 到 Chezmoi 的迁移
items.summary_en: The piece walks through migrating from GNU Stow to Chezmoi for managing dotfiles, highlighting Chezmoi's declarative approach, cross-machine syncing, and built‑in encryption. It covers practical steps and benefits like easier templating and safer updates across devices.
items.summary_zh: 文章介绍将 dotfiles 的管理工具从 GNU Stow 迁移到 Chezmoi，并比较了它们在跨主机同步、声明式管理和内置加密方面的差异。还给出迁移的实际步骤，以及在多设备环境中实现更安全、可重复配置的好处。

items.title_en: Fable Converted Pylint to Rust
items.title_zh: Fable 将 Pylint 转换为 Rust
items.summary_en: A Rust rewrite of Pylint by Fable promises dramatically faster Python linting and lower CPU usage on large repos. The project demonstrates how rewriting a core tooling component in Rust can yield significant performance gains while staying compatible with Python tooling.
items.summary_zh: Fable 将 Pylint 重写为 Rust，承诺在大型代码库上实现显著更快的 Python 代码静态分析并降低 CPU 占用。该项目展示了将核心工具组件用 Rust 重实现如何带来可观的性能提升，同时保持与 Python 工具链的兼容性。

items.title_en: US court rules Ohio can restrict children's use of social media
items.title_zh: 美国法院裁定俄亥俄州可限制儿童使用社交媒体
items.summary_en: An Ohio policy limiting children's access to social media was upheld by a US court, marking a notable endorsement of state-level controls for minors online. The ruling highlights ongoing debates over digital safety, parental authority, and platform responsibilities.
items.summary_zh: 法院裁定俄亥俄州可以限制未成年人使用社交媒体，显示出州层面对青少年网络安全的潜在新方向。这一裁决凸显了数字安全、家长监管与平台在年龄限制方面的责任之间的持续辩论。

items.title_en: The Token Compression Illusion: Why I'm Skeptical of RTK
items.title_zh: 令牌压缩错觉：为何我对 RTK 持怀疑态度
items.summary_en: The article questions the practical benefits of token compression techniques like RTK, arguing that claimed gains are overstated and may incur hidden costs such as information loss and latency. It urges more rigorous evaluation and realistic benchmarks.
items.summary_zh: 文章质疑像 RTK 这样的令牌压缩技术的实际收益，认为所声称的提升被高估，可能带来信息损失、延迟和兼容性问题等隐性成本。呼吁进行更严谨的评估与现实基准测试。

items.title_en: Launch HN: TesterArmy (YC P26) – Agents that test web and mobile apps
items.title_zh: Launch HN: TesterArmy（YC P26）——测试网页和移动应用的代理
items.summary_en: TesterArmy offers autonomous agents designed to test web and mobile apps, feeding results into CI pipelines. Backed by Y Combinator, the project exemplifies the shift toward AI-assisted QA and scalable automated testing.
items.summary_zh: TesterArmy 提供用于测试网页和移动应用的自主代理，能将测试结果推送到持续集成管道。作为 YC 支持的项目，展示了向 AI 辅助质量保证与大规模自动化测试的趋势。

items.title_en: Zork name origin got an update on Wikipedia
items.title_zh: Zork 名称起源在维基百科获得更新
items.summary_en: New details have emerged about the origin of the name Zork, with editors adding context and anecdotes. The update sheds light on Infocom’s naming choices and early software culture that helped the game become a retro-technology icon.
items.summary_zh: 关于经典文本冒险游戏 Zork 的名称起源出现新信息，条目中增添了背景与趣闻。此次更新帮助人们了解 Infocom 早期的命名选择及游戏文化，如何让这款作品成为复古科技的标志。

items.title_en: The Korean telecom giant at the center of Anthropic's Mythos controversy
items.title_zh: 引发 Anthropic Mythos 争议的韩国电信巨头
items.summary_en: SK Telecom is positioned at the center of a Mythos export‑controls controversy involving Anthropic, highlighting how regulatory rules and international partnerships influence AI access and deployment. The case exposes the leverage telecoms hold over AI supply chains and regulatory compliance.
items.summary_zh: 韩国电信巨头 SK Telecom 处于与 Anthropic 的 Mythos 争议核心，涉及出口管制与跨境合规等议题。此事凸显大型电信运营商在 AI 供应链和监管遵从中的影响力与潜在风险。

items.title_en: Building a robotics research setup that lives next to my desk
items.title_zh: 放在桌边的机器人研究系统
items.summary_en: A compact robotics research setup sits near the author’s desk, emphasizing modular hardware and accessible control software for rapid experimentation. The setup illustrates how small, affordable rigs can accelerate learning and prototype iteration in robotics research.
items.summary_zh: 桌边的小型机器人研究系统强调模块化硬件和易用的控制软件，便于快速进行实验与迭代。此类桌旁工作流展示了在机器人研究中，用低成本设备加速学习与原型开发的可行性。

items.title_en: Why Do So Many Everyday Systems Feel Harder to Use Now?
items.title_zh: 为何日常系统如今越来越难用？
items.summary_en: Explores the growing sense that everyday software systems have become harder to use, despite more capable technology. The piece argues that design drift, feature bloat, and changing expectations create misaligned mental models, and suggests ways to restore predictability and usability.
items.summary_zh: 作者探讨日常软件系统为何越来越难用，尽管技术更强大。设计漂移、功能臃肿与不断变化的期望打破了人们的心智模型，提出通过更可预测的设计和清晰的导航来提升易用性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Talos – Open-source WASM interpreter for Lean
items.title_zh: Show HN：Talos——基于 Lean 的开源 WASM 解释器
items.summary_en: Talos is an open-source WASM interpreter implemented in Lean, emphasizing safety and potential formal verification benefits. It demonstrates a WASM runtime in a functional language and may influence future tooling for verification-focused ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Talos 是用 Lean 编写的开源 WASM 解释器，强调安全性与潜在的形式化验证优势，展示了在函数式语言中实现 WASM 运行时的可能性。

items.title_en: The Harajuku Moment (2024)
items.title_zh: 原宿时刻
items.summary_en: The Harajuku Moment discusses how subcultures and niche aesthetics can drive mainstream innovation, as communities experiment and share ideas quickly. It's a lens on rapid cultural shifts fueling tech and creative cycles.
items.summary_zh: 《原宿时刻》探讨了子文化与小众美学如何推动主流创新，社群快速试验并分享创意。它揭示了加速的文化转变如何促发科技与创意的循环。

items.title_en: DARPA Heavy Life Challenge
items.title_zh: DARPA 重生命挑战计划
items.summary_en: DARPA's Heavy Life Challenge (LIFT) seeks to push AI and robotics research toward robust, long-horizon learning in dynamic, real-world settings. The program outlines challenges and milestones to accelerate reliable, adaptable systems for critical tasks.
items.summary_zh: DARPA 的重生命挑战计划（LIFT）推动 AI 与机器人研究在动态真实环境中实现长期、稳健的学习与适应能力。该计划设定挑战和里程碑，旨在加速构建可靠、可迁移的关键任务智能系统。

items.title_en: DuckDB Internals: Why Is DuckDB Fast? (Part 1)
items.title_zh: DuckDB 内部原理：为何高效？（第一部分）
items.summary_en: This first installment explains why DuckDB is exceptionally fast, covering vectorized in-process execution, columnar storage, and analytics-oriented optimizations. It argues that tight host integration and data locality are key to its performance edge.
items.summary_zh: 本文聚焦 DuckDB 的高性能根源，介绍向量化执行、列式存储和对分析型工作负载的优化等设计要点。核心观点是与宿主进程的紧密集成和数据局部性是实现其性能优势的关键。

items.title_en: How Japan's railways stayed one while splitting apart
items.title_zh: 日本铁路在分拆中如何保持统一
items.summary_en: An exploration of how Japan's railways preserved a unified national identity despite privatization into independent JR companies. The article delves into branding choices, logo consistency, and cross-network coordination that kept the system feeling cohesive.
items.summary_zh: 探讨日本铁路在分拆成多家独立公司后，如何保持统一的国家形象。文章聚焦品牌策略、标志的一致性，以及跨网络协作，维持系统的连贯感。

items.title_en: Show HN: Music from every single country on Earth, generated in Esperanto
items.title_zh: Show HN：以世界语生成的全球各国音乐
items.summary_en: A project generates musical pieces representing every country, with interfaces and metadata using Esperanto. It showcases a globally sourced, inclusive approach to data-driven music and language.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目用全球各国风格创作音乐，并用世界语呈现元数据与界面，展示以全球化、包容性为导向的数据驱动音乐创作。

items.title_en: To study how chips work, MIT researchers built their own operating system
items.title_zh: 为研究芯片工作原理，MIT 研究者自建操作系统
items.summary_en: MIT researchers built a custom OS to observe how chips behave under controlled microarchitectural experiments, removing some vendor constraints. The project serves as a hands-on tool for hardware researchers to test hypotheses about instruction scheduling, caches, and I/O paths.
items.summary_zh: MIT 研究者为在受控条件下研究芯片微架构行为，自己从零搭建了一个操作系统，降低对厂商的依赖。该项目提供了一个直接的硬件研究工具，用于检验指令调度、缓存与 I/O 路径等假设。

items.title_en: Ten years of ClickHouse in open source
items.title_zh: ClickHouse 开源十年回顾
items.summary_en: A decade of open-source development has shaped ClickHouse into a high-performance, columnar analytics engine with a thriving community.
items.summary_zh: 十年的开源开发让 ClickHouse 成为高性能的列式分析引擎，并拥有活跃的社区。文章回顾了关键里程碑、治理演变，以及早期架构选择如何推动在各行业的广泛采用。

items.title_en: Zen and the Art of Machine Learning Research
items.title_zh: 机器学习研究的禅意与艺术
items.summary_en: ML research benefits from simplicity, reproducibility, and deliberate iteration rather than hype. This piece argues for a mindful approach to experimentation, open data, and robust evaluation to advance reliable models.
items.summary_zh: 机器学习研究应追求简洁、可重复性与有目的的迭代，而非追逐热度。文章主张用心对待实验设计、开放数据与稳健评估，以推动更可靠的模型。

items.title_en: Renting vs. Buying – A case study for Bangalore
items.title_zh: 班加罗尔租房 vs 买房：案例研究
items.summary_en: This Bangalore case study weighs renting versus buying for tech workers, factoring in price-to-rent ratios, cap rates, and total cost of ownership. It highlights how local market conditions, mobility, and career plans shape housing decisions in a fast-growing tech hub.
items.summary_zh: 本案例研究比较了班加罗尔科技工作者的租房与买房成本，考虑价格与租金比、投资回报率以及总拥有成本。研究指出本地市场、流动性需求和职业规划如何影响这一全球增长的科技中心的住房决策。

items.title_en: Agentic Resource Discovery Specification
items.title_zh: 代理式资源发现规范
items.summary_en: A new specification for agentic resource discovery outlines how autonomous agents should locate and reference resources safely and efficiently. It aims to standardize interactions, improving interoperability and reducing risk in multi-agent systems.
items.summary_zh: 一份代理式资源发现的新规范提出了自治代理如何安全、高效地定位和引用资源的标准做法，旨在提升跨系统的互操作性并降低多代理环境的风险。

items.title_en: Gribouille 0.3.0: A Grammar of Graphics for Typst
items.title_zh: Gribouille 0.3.0：Typst 的图形语法
items.summary_en: Gribouille 0.3.0 adds a grammar-of-graphics approach to Typst, enabling declarative plotting inside documents. This expands Typst’s data visualization capabilities and makes it easier to produce consistent charts alongside text.
items.summary_zh: Gribouille 0.3.0 为 Typst 引入图形语法，允许在文档中以声明式方式绘制图表。此举拓展了 Typst 的可视化能力，便于在文本中直接生成一致的图形。

items.title_en: If your product is Great, it doesn't need to be Good (2010)
items.title_zh: 如果你的产品很棒，它就不需要是“好”（2010）
items.summary_en: Paul Buchheit argues that truly great products can outshine ordinary polish and that teams should focus on delivering extraordinary value rather than chasing generic 'good' improvements. The note offers a counterpoint to feature creep and highlights the importance of a clear product thesis.
items.summary_zh: 保罗·布赫特认为真正出色的产品能超越普通的精修，团队应专注于提供非凡的价值，而非追逐泛泛的“好”的改进。这一观点对避免功能膨胀、坚持清晰的产品定位具有重要意义。

items.title_en: Cell-based architecture for resilient payment systems
items.title_zh: 基于单元格的架构提升支付系统弹性
items.summary_en: Cell-based architecture is presented as a path to fault isolation and resilient payments. By partitioning state and operations into independent cells, outages in one cell won’t cascade, enabling faster recovery and safer experimentation. The approach aligns with fintech’s demand for 24/7 uptime and scalable, compliant architectures.
items.summary_zh: 将系统分割为独立的单元格以实现故障隔离和支付系统弹性。通过对状态和操作进行细粒度划分，单个单元的故障不会蔓延，从而更快恢复并便于安全试验。这一思路符合金融科技对全天候可用性、可扩展性和合规性的要求。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pagecast – Publish Markdown/HTML Reports to Cloudflare Pages
items.title_zh: Show HN：Pagecast——将 Markdown/HTML 报告发布到 Cloudflare Pages
items.summary_en: Pagecast provides a simple workflow to publish Markdown/HTML reports to Cloudflare Pages, enabling quick sharing of docs and dashboards with minimal setup. It emphasizes lightweight, reproducible publishing for small teams or personal projects.
items.summary_zh: Pagecast 提供将 Markdown/HTML 报告发布到 Cloudflare Pages 的简易工作流，便于快速分享文档与仪表板，且设置简单、可重复性强。适合小团队或个人项目。

items.title_en: Akse3D – open-source 3D modelling anyone can master
items.title_zh: Akse3D：人人可掌握的开源 3D 建模工具
items.summary_en: Akse3D positions itself as an accessible, open-source 3D modeling tool designed for newcomers yet capable enough for everyday work. It emphasizes approachable UX, extensibility, and a community-driven roadmap for improving features.
items.summary_zh: Akse3D 致力于成为面向初学者的开源3D建模工具，同时具备日常工作所需的实用性。它强调友好的用户体验、可扩展性，以及以社区为驱动的功能路线图。

items.title_en: "No Feigning Surprise"
items.title_zh: "No Feigning Surprise" 漫画
items.summary_en: An ultra-short comic capturing a crisp, honest reaction to an unexpected moment. The minimalist storytelling leans into humor and skepticism, offering a quick reflection on how we respond to surprises.
items.summary_zh: 这部极短的漫画以简洁笔触呈现对突发情景的真诚反应，带有幽默感与克制。通过极简的叙事，探讨我们在面对意外时的情绪与判断力。

items.title_en: Telescope Ranchers
items.title_zh: 望远镜牧场主
items.summary_en: An evocative look at ranchers who embrace astronomy as a core part of life, showing how wide-open skies and remote environment foster unique stargazing practices. The piece contrasts traditional ranching with modern observational tech, shedding light on how rural communities contribute to science culture.
items.summary_zh: 这篇报道讲述把天文学融入牧场生活的牧场主们，辽阔夜空和偏远环境让观星成为独特的日常。文本对比了传统牧场与现代观测技术，揭示偏远社区如何为科学文化添入一抹独特风景。

items.title_en: Horizons JPL Solar System Data Demo and NASA DSN Updates: Datastar, Common Lisp
items.title_zh: Horizons JPL 太阳系数据演示及 NASA DSN 更新：Datastar 与 Common Lisp
items.summary_en: The Horizons data demo showcases solar-system ephemerides and NASA DSN status, with updates to Datastar. It also notes the use of Common Lisp in workflows, illustrating the tooling ecosystem behind space missions.
items.summary_zh: Horizons 数据演示展示太阳系历书数据和 NASA 深空网络状态，提及 Datastar 的更新，以及在工作流中使用 Common Lisp，体现太空任务背后的工具生态。

items.title_en: I used sound waves to make espresso. It could cut coffee‑brewing energy use by ¾
items.title_zh: 用声波冲煮浓缩咖啡，或能把冲煮能耗降低约75%
items.summary_en: A lab-scale demonstration uses acoustic waves to improve espresso extraction, potentially slashing brewing energy by up to 75%. The approach challenges conventional thermal methods and points to broader opportunities for energy-efficient food and beverage processing. Real-world practicality and consumer taste remain questions.
items.summary_zh: 一项实验性研究用声波辅助提取浓缩咖啡，理论上可将冲煮能耗降低多达75%。该方法挑战传统的热传导依赖，并提示在食品饮料加工领域的潜在节能机会。实际可用性与口味影响仍待验证。

items.title_en: The Productivity J-Curve [pdf] (2018)
items.title_zh: 生产力 J 曲线 [pdf]（2018）
items.summary_en: The J-curve describes a temporary dip in productivity during the initial adoption of a new tool or process, followed by long-term gains as learning and optimization occur. It offers actionable guidance for managers on timing, experimentation, and metrics to distinguish short-term dips from long-run gains.
items.summary_zh: J 曲线揭示在采用新工具或流程初期生产力常常短暂下降，随后随着学习和优化而提升。本文为管理者提供可执行的建议，帮助把握时机、设计试验并用正确的指标区分短期低谷与长期收益。

items.title_en: Show HN: Metiq: a real time 3D globe for 100 public datasets
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个实时的三维地球仪，用于可视化100个公开数据集
items.summary_en: Metiq offers a real-time 3D globe visualization for a hundred public datasets, enabling fast, immersive exploration of geo-annotated data. Built for developers, it demonstrates how WebGL and streaming data can empower interactive data storytelling.
items.summary_zh: Metiq 提供一个实时的三维地球仪，用于可视化100个公开数据集，便于对地理标注数据进行沉浸式探索。面向开发者的工具展示了 WebGL 与数据流在互动数据讲述中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: SMTP Relay with Web Dashboard
items.title_zh: 带 Web 仪表板的 SMTP 中继
items.summary_en: This project provides a self-hosted SMTP relay with a web dashboard for monitoring and management. It appeals to small teams needing simple, observable mail routing, while covering security basics like TLS, authentication, and anti-spam controls.
items.summary_zh: 该项目提供一个带 Web 仪表板的自托管 SMTP 中继，便于监控和管理邮箱路由。适合小型团队使用，强调 TLS、认证与反垃圾等安全要点。

items.title_en: Show HN: Modeloop – From visual algorithms to microcontroller C code
items.title_zh: Show HN：Modeloop——从可视化算法到微控制器 C 代码
items.summary_en: Modeloop translates visual, block-based algorithms into microcontroller C code, bridging the gap between design and embedded deployment. It enables rapid prototyping for hardware projects where performance and resource constraints matter. This approach foreshadows a low-code pathway for hardware-software co-design.
items.summary_zh: Modeloop 将可视化的块状算法转换为微控制器的 C 代码，缩短设计到嵌入式实现的距离。它让在资源受限的硬件上进行快速原型开发成为现实，提升性能与效率的权衡。此类低代码路径将推动软硬件协同设计的创新。

items.title_en: The Raku Foundation is born
items.title_zh: Raku 基金会成立
items.summary_en: The Raku language gains a formal home with a new foundation tasked with governance, funding, and ecosystem development. The move aims to coordinate community efforts, standardize tooling, and steward the language's future.
items.summary_zh: Raku 语言迎来正式的治理机构——基金会，负责治理、资金与生态建设。此举旨在协调社区工作、标准化工具链，并共同托举语言的未来。

items.title_en: This 1976 University Experiment Spun Up the U.S. Wind Industry
items.title_zh: 1976 年的一项大学研究推动了美国现代风能产业
items.summary_en: A 1976 university study catalyzed the modern U.S. wind industry by highlighting feasibility and policy momentum at the time. It helped attract investment and policy attention during the energy crisis era. The piece underscores how academic work can spark a national-scale clean energy sector.
items.summary_zh: 1976 年的一项大学研究推动了美国现代风能产业的发展，凸显了风电的可行性并推动当时的政策与投资热潮。在能源危机背景下，这项工作被视为点燃国家级清洁能源产业的重要催化剂。

items.title_en: Reinventing the Renaissance
items.title_zh: 重新诠释文艺复兴
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the idea of a modern Renaissance is being reimagined through cross-disciplinary innovation, digital culture, and new forms of knowledge exchange.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为，现代文艺复兴的概念正在通过跨学科创新、数字文化以及新的知识交流形式被重新构想。

items.title_en: Music generation using Algebra, presented as web MIDI shop
items.title_zh: 用代数学生成音乐，并以网页 MIDI 的形式呈现
items.summary_en: The project showcases music generation based on algebraic methods, packaged as a web MIDI tool. It offers an alternative to data-hungry ML models and may appeal to composers seeking deterministic, explainable workflows.
items.summary_zh: 该项目以代数方法生成音乐，并以网页 MIDI 的形式提供工具，提供了一种不依赖大规模机器学习的数据可解释工作流，可能吸引寻求确定性创作流程的作曲家。
